快3稳定靠谱导师推荐【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238882003_63378184<br>vk.com/topic-238994461_64832623<br>vk.com/topic-238982414_63163159<br>vk.com/topic-238999481_64832630<br>vk.com/topic-238940166_63513549<br>vk.com/topic-238952986_63513543<br>vk.com/topic-238952810_64260533<br>vk.com/topic-238924268_63684835<br>vk.com/topic-238896817_64617564<br>vk.com/topic-238994683_63378206<br>vk.com/topic-238999486_63513558<br>vk.com/topic-238989737_64617573<br>vk.com/topic-238994658_63684864<br>vk.com/topic-238909188_63684849<br>vk.com/topic-238951757_64617610<br>vk.com/topic-238999472_63775746<br>vk.com/topic-238951214_63163209<br>vk.com/topic-238896812_63775751<br>vk.com/topic-238924278_63684880<br>vk.com/topic-238940164_63163190<br>vk.com/topic-238949731_64832680<br>vk.com/topic-238948365_63076681<br>vk.com/topic-238831954_63163353<br>vk.com/topic-238949737_64617637<br>vk.com/topic-238951571_64832691<br>vk.com/topic-238999527_64617638<br>vk.com/topic-238980321_64832711<br>vk.com/topic-238916119_63958883<br>vk.com/topic-238909190_64260613<br>vk.com/topic-238951759_63958881<br>vk.com/topic-238953044_63163283<br>vk.com/topic-238917386_63513637<br>vk.com/topic-238952821_64832705<br>vk.com/to
